industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: BCPG Public Company Limited
summary: BCPG Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, produces and distributes electric power from renewable resources in Thailand. It generates electricity from solar, wind, geothermal, hydro, and biomass power. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. BCPG Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Bangchak Corporation Public Company Limited.
